title: Your First Chance To Play The Duskbloods Early Is Next Month
title_zh: 下月你将首次有机会提前体验《暗血》

sentences.en: From Software's upcoming game The Duskbloods looks be quite the departure from the studio's previous work, and if you want a chance to play it ahead of its official launch, you'll soon have your chance.
sentences.zh: From Software即将推出的游戏《暗血》似乎与该工作室以往的作品有很大不同，如果你想有机会在官方发布前体验这款游戏，你很快就会有这个机会。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】复合句，包含if引导的条件状语从句

sentences.en: The game will be running a closed network test in August, with registration for a chance to participate starting very soon.
sentences.zh: 这款游戏将于8月进行封闭网络测试，参与测试的注册即将很快开始。

sentences.en: The Duskbloods' closed network test will run from August 21-23, and will feature support for eight-player multiplayer sessions.
sentences.zh: 《暗血》的封闭网络测试将于8月21日至23日进行，并将支持八人多人游戏会话。

sentences.en: An application period will run from July 22-28, and participation requires a Nintendo Switch 2 system and an active Nintendo Switch Online subscription.
sentences.zh: 申请期将从7月22日持续到28日，参与测试需要拥有任天堂Switch 2系统和有效的任天堂Switch在线订阅服务。

sentences.en: From Software says the closed network test will be focused on a few key areas: server load, multiplayer problem-solving, and game balance.
sentences.zh: From Software表示，封闭网络测试将专注于几个关键领域：服务器负载、多人游戏问题解决和游戏平衡性。

mc_quiz.question: What are the key focus areas of The Duskbloods' closed network test?
options: A. Graphics quality, sound design, and story elements
B. Server load, multiplayer problem-solving, and game balance
C. Character customization, weapon variety, and level design
D. Online connectivity, user interface, and controller compatibility
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：请查看文章中明确提到的测试重点内容。

translation_task.en: From Software's upcoming game The Duskbloods looks be quite the departure from the studio's previous work, and if you want a chance to play it ahead of its official launch, you'll soon have your chance.
translation_task.zh: From Software即将推出的游戏《暗血》似乎与该工作室以往的作品有很大不同，如果你想有机会在官方发布前体验这款游戏，你很快就会有这个机会。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了复合句的翻译，特别是if引导的条件状语从句的翻译技巧，以及departure一词在游戏语境下的准确表达。

options: A. Graphics quality, sound design, and story elements
B. Server load, multiplayer problem-solving, and game balance
C. Character customization, weapon variety, and level design
D. Online connectivity, user interface, and controller compatibility
quiz.hint: 提示：请查看文章中明确提到的测试重点内容。

title: Apple opens its new Siri AI to everyone with the iOS 27 public beta
title_zh: 苹果通过iOS 27公开测试版向所有人开放其新版Siri人工智能

sentences.en: If you've been waiting to try Apple's revamped Siri without installing a developer beta, you now can.
sentences.zh: 如果你一直想尝试苹果公司重新设计的Siri，但又不想安装开发者测试版，现在你就可以做到了。
sentences.grammar: 【条件状语从句】使用if引导的条件句，表达假设情况下的结果

sentences.en: The company on Tuesday released the iOS 27 public beta, giving iPhone owners early access to its AI-powered assistant and other new features before the software's official launch this fall.
sentences.zh: 该公司周二发布了iOS 27公开测试版，让iPhone用户能够在软件今年秋季正式发布前，提前体验其人工智能助手和其他新功能。
sentences.grammar: 【现在分词作结果状语】giving引导的分词短语表示前文动作带来的结果

mc_quiz.question: What is the main purpose of the iOS 27 public beta release?
options: A. To fix bugs in the previous iOS version
B. To allow iPhone users to try new features early
C. To replace the developer beta program
D. To announce the official launch date
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：文章中明确提到了测试版的目的和用户能获得的体验。

translation_task.en: The company on Tuesday released the iOS 27 public beta, giving iPhone owners early access to its AI-powered assistant and other new features before the software's official launch this fall.
translation_task.zh: 该公司周二发布了iOS 27公开测试版，让iPhone用户能够在软件今年秋季正式发布前，提前体验其人工智能助手和其他新功能。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了现在分词短语作结果状语的翻译技巧，以及长句中时间状语的处理方式。

quiz.question: What is the main purpose of the iOS 27 public beta release?
options: A. To fix bugs in the previous iOS version
B. To allow iPhone users to try new features early
C. To replace the developer beta program
D. To announce the official launch date
quiz.hint: 提示：文章中明确提到了测试版的目的和用户能获得的体验。

title: GOG Wants You To Make Your Own Physical Games
title_zh: GOG希望您制作自己的实体游戏

sentences.en: In the wake of the news that Sony will end PlayStation disc production by 2028, a lot of folks are expressing their disgust at the idea of a digital-only game library.
sentences.zh: 随着索尼宣布将在2028年前停止PlayStation光盘生产的消息，许多人表达了对纯数字游戏库这一想法的反感。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】介词短语作状语，表达时间背景；现在进行时表达正在发生的动作。

sentences.en: But players aren't the only ones sharing their frustration--today, GOG.com joined the conversation with a short tutorial showing players how to physically preserve their digital games.
sentences.zh: 但玩家并不是唯一表达挫败感的人——今天，GOG.com加入讨论，发布了一个简短教程，教玩家如何将数字游戏实体化保存。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】破折号用于补充说明；现在分词短语作后置定语。

sentences.en: "Download the offline installer of any of your games on GOG, save it to a disc, and it's yours forever," the digital gaming storefront shared in an X post.
sentences.zh: "下载您在GOG上任何游戏的离线安装程序，将其保存到光盘上，它就永远属于你了，"这家数字游戏商店在X平台上分享道。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】直接引语；祈使句结构；it's的缩写形式。

sentences.en: "You don't need a storefront's permission to play what you bought."
sentences.zh: "您不需要商店的许可来玩您购买的游戏。"
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】不定式作目的状语；what引导的名词性从句作宾语。

sentences.en: Of course, this doesn't perfectly solve the problem.
sentences.zh: 当然，这并不能完美解决问题。

sentences.en: Not every game is available on PC, not every game is available for purchase on GOG (like Ubisoft's game catalogue, ...
sentences.zh: 并非所有游戏都有PC版本，也并非所有游戏都可以在GOG上购买（如育碧的游戏目录，...
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】双重否定结构；括号内的补充说明。

mc_quiz.question: What is GOG.com suggesting players do to preserve their digital games?
options: A. Buy physical copies from Sony
B. Download offline installers and save them to discs
C. Only purchase games from Ubisoft
D. Wait for PlayStation to continue disc production
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：查看GOG在X平台上的分享内容，他们具体建议了什么方法。

translation_task.en: "Download the offline installer of any of your games on GOG, save it to a disc, and it's yours forever," the digital gaming storefront shared in an X post.
translation_task.zh: "下载您在GOG上任何游戏的离线安装程序，将其保存到光盘上，它就永远属于你了，"这家数字游戏商店在X平台上分享道。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了直接引语的翻译技巧，以及如何将英语的简洁表达转换为符合中文习惯的流畅表达。

quiz.question: What is GOG.com suggesting players do to preserve their digital games?
options: A. Buy physical copies from Sony
B. Download offline installers and save them to discs
C. Only purchase games from Ubisoft
D. Wait for PlayStation to continue disc production
quiz.hint: 提示：查看GOG在X平台上的分享内容，他们具体建议了什么方法。

title: LA Noire Could Have Featured A Different, Very Famous, And More Expensive Lead Actor
title_zh: 《黑色洛城》本可能由另一位更著名的昂贵主演出演

sentences.en: The 2011 detective game LA Noire, which was published by GTA company Rockstar Games, starred Mad Men actor Aaron Staton as the lead character, Cole Phelps.
sentences.zh: 2011年的侦探游戏《黑色洛城》由《侠盗猎车手》开发商Rockstar Games发行，由《广告狂人》演员Aaron Staton饰演主角Cole Phelps。
sentences.grammar: 【定语从句】which引导的非限制性定语从句修饰LA Noire

sentences.en: A writer on the game has now revealed that a different Mad Men actor, Jon Hamm, was considered for the role as well.
sentences.zh: 该游戏的一位编剧现在透露，另一位《广告狂人》演员Jon Hamm也曾被考虑出演该角色。
sentences.grammar: 【宾语从句】that引导的宾语从句作为revealed的宾语

sentences.en: Staton portrayed Ken Cosgrove on Mad Men, with Hamm playing the show's leading role, Don Draper.
sentences.zh: Staton在《广告狂人》中饰演Ken Cosgrove，而Hamm则扮演该剧的主角Don Draper。
sentences.grammar: 【with复合结构】with+名词+分词构成独立主格结构

sentences.en: Daniel McMahon told IGN that Mad Men and LA Noire had the same casting director, and that Hamm was "discussed as a possibility for the role of Cole Phelps."
sentences.zh: Daniel McMahon告诉IGN，《广告狂人》和《黑色洛城》有同一位选角导演，而且Hamm曾"被讨论作为Cole Phelps这一角色的可能性"。
sentences.grammar: 【并列宾语从句】that...and that...连接两个并列的宾语从句

sentences.en: "It was never said at the time, but now, I understand the vision which was Jon Hamm is a wonderful actor, but he's not Cole Phelps," McMahon said.
sentences.zh: "当时从未有人说过，但现在我明白了那个构想——Jon Hamm是一位出色的演员，但他不是Cole Phelps，"McMahon说道。
sentences.grammar: 【插入语】破折号之间的内容是对vision的解释说明

sentences.en: McMahon went on to say that Staton was "much better at portraying Cole's fragility."
sentences.zh: McMahon继续说道，Staton"在表现Cole的脆弱性方面要好得多"。
sentences.grammar: 【比较级】much better than...的比较结构

mc_quiz.question: Why was Jon Hamm not chosen for the role of Cole Phelps in LA Noire?
options: A. He was too expensive for the budget
B. The casting director preferred Aaron Staton
C. He didn't have the right qualities for the character
D. He was already committed to another project
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：注意McMahon对两位演员的评价，特别是关于角色特质的描述。

translation_task.en: "It was never said at the time, but now, I understand the vision which was Jon Hamm is a wonderful actor, but he's not Cole Phelps," McMahon said.
translation_task.zh: "当时从未有人说过，但现在我明白了那个构想——Jon Hamm是一位出色的演员，但他不是Cole Phelps，"McMahon说道。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了破折号作为插入语解释说明的用法，以及which引导的非限制性定语从句的翻译技巧。

quiz.question: Why was Jon Hamm not chosen for the role of Cole Phelps in LA Noire?
options: A. He was too expensive for the budget
B. The casting director preferred Aaron Staton
C. He didn't have the right qualities for the character
D. He was already committed to another project
quiz.hint: 提示：注意McMahon对两位演员的评价，特别是关于角色特质的描述。

title: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
title_zh: Meta在遭遇强烈反对后移除Instagram上有争议的AI功能

sentences.en: "Our intent was to provide a useful creative tool and to give people control over whether their public content could be referenced in this way," the company said in a blog post.
sentences.zh: 该公司在博客文章中表示：'我们的意图是提供一个有用的创意工具，让人们能够控制他们的公开内容是否可以以这种方式被引用。'
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】直接引语结构，使用双引号标示，包含目的状语从句和条件状语从句

sentences.en: "We've heard the feedback that this feature missed the mark, so it's no longer available."
sentences.zh: '我们已经收到了反馈，认为这个功能没有达到预期效果，因此它已不再可用。'
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】包含结果状语从句，使用现在完成时表示已完成动作

words.meaning: 习语. 未达到预期效果，不成功

mc_quiz.question: Why did Meta remove the AI feature from Instagram?
options: A. Because the feature was too expensive to maintain
B. Because users complained it didn't work as intended
C. Because it violated Instagram's terms of service
D. Because Meta wanted to replace it with a better version
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：请关注文章中关于用户反馈和功能效果的描述。

translation_task.en: "Our intent was to provide a useful creative tool and to give people control over whether their public content could be referenced in this way," the company said in a blog post.
translation_task.zh: 该公司在博客文章中表示：'我们的意图是提供一个有用的创意工具，让人们能够控制他们的公开内容是否可以以这种方式被引用。'
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了英语中目的状语从句和条件状语从句的翻译技巧，以及专业术语'creative tool'和'referenced'的准确表达。

quiz.question: Why did Meta remove the AI feature from Instagram?
options: A. Because the feature was too expensive to maintain
B. Because users complained it didn't work as intended
C. Because it violated Instagram's terms of service
D. Because Meta wanted to replace it with a better version
quiz.hint: 提示：请关注文章中关于用户反馈和功能效果的描述。

title: Open source AI matters more than ever, according to Hugging Face's Clem Delangue
title_zh: 根据Hugging Face的Clem Delangue，开源AI比以往任何时候都重要

sentences.en: Open source AI is booming, according to Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue.
sentences.zh: 根据Hugging Face的首席执行官Clem Delangue的说法，开源AI正在蓬勃发展。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】介词短语作状语，主系表结构

words.meaning: adj. 迅速发展的，繁荣的

sentences.en: The company has grown into something like a GitHub for AI in recent years, where AI builders can share and download open models and datasets.
sentences.zh: 近年来，该公司已发展成为类似AI领域的GitHub，AI开发者可以在那里分享和下载开源模型和数据集。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】定语从句，现在完成时

sentences.en: now used by roughly half the Fortune 500.
sentences.zh: 现在已被约一半的财富500强公司使用。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】过去分词短语作后置定语

words.meaning: n. 财富500强（美国最大500家公司的年度排名）

sentences.en: Delangue has seen the same story play out again and again: companies start [...]
sentences.zh: Delangue已经多次看到同样的故事上演：公司开始[...]
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】现在完成时，冒号引导解释说明

mc_quiz.question: What has Hugging Face become according to the article?
options: A. A company that creates AI models
B. A platform similar to GitHub for AI
C. A dataset provider for Fortune 500 companies
D. A competitor to open source AI
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：文章中明确描述了Hugging Face的发展方向和功能。

translation_task.en: The company has grown into something like a GitHub for AI in recent years, where AI builders can share and download open models and datasets.
translation_task.zh: 近年来，该公司已发展成为类似AI领域的GitHub，AI开发者可以在那里分享和下载开源模型和数据集。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了定语从句的翻译技巧，以及'grown into something like'的灵活表达。

quiz.question: What has Hugging Face become according to the article?
options: A. A company that creates AI models
B. A platform similar to GitHub for AI

title: Microsoft Refutes Notion That Foreign-Worker Visas Were Behind Mass Xbox Layoffs
title_zh: 微软驳斥外国员工签证导致大规模Xbox裁员的说法

sentences.en: Since news broke of Microsoft's recent round of mass layoffs --which affected 1,600 people immediately and will reach double that number over the next year--a number of reports have claimed that mass approvals of foreign-worker visas were behind the decision.
sentences.zh: 自微软最近一轮大规模裁员的消息传出以来——这一裁员立即影响了1600人，并在未来一年内将影响人数翻倍——一些报道称，大量批准的外国员工签证是这一决定背后的原因。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】主句使用了现在完成时，包含一个由which引导的非限制性定语从句，破折号用于补充说明裁员规模。

sentences.en: Now, Microsoft communications lead Frank X. Shaw has refuted what he calls "bad information."
sentences.zh: 现在，微软通讯主管弗兰克·X·肖驳斥了他所谓的"错误信息"。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】句子使用了现在完成时，what引导的名词性从句作为refuted的宾语。

sentences.en: In a Twitter post, Shaw said that while there are Microsoft workers using H-1B visas, they are "not specific to Xbox and represent a small percentage of Microsoft's overall workforce."
sentences.zh: 肖在一条Twitter帖子中表示，虽然确实有微软员工使用H-1B签证，但这些员工"并非特定于Xbox部门，仅占微软总劳动力的很小一部分"。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】while引导的让步状语从句，引出主句内容，引号内为直接引语。

sentences.en: "And the majority of the roles impacted were not American roles."
sentences.zh: "而且受影响的大多数职位并非美国本土员工的职位。"
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】被动语态were impacted，表示职位受到影响，not American roles强调国籍因素。

mc_quiz.question: According to Microsoft's Frank X. Shaw, what was the real reason for the Xbox layoffs?
options: A. Mass approvals of foreign-worker visas
B. Restructuring the unhealthy Xbox business
C. Replacing American employees with foreign workers
D. Reducing the overall workforce percentage
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：肖在Twitter中明确表示裁员是为了重组Xbox业务，并否认了与外国员工签证有关。

translation_task.en: In a Twitter post, Shaw said that while there are Microsoft workers using H-1B visas, they are "not specific to Xbox and represent a small percentage of Microsoft's overall workforce."
translation_task.zh: 肖在一条Twitter帖子中表示，虽然确实有微软员工使用H-1B签证，但这些员工"并非特定于Xbox部门，仅占微软总劳动力的很小一部分"。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了while引导的让步状语从句的翻译技巧，以及引号内直接引语的准确传达。

quiz.question: According to Microsoft's Frank X. Shaw, what was the real reason for the Xbox layoffs?
options: A. Mass approvals of foreign-worker visas

title: Meta enters the crowded AI coding battle with Muse Spark 1.1
title_zh: Meta推出Muse Spark 1.1，加入拥挤的AI编程竞争

sentences.en: Meta's pitch to users is Spark's ability to handle large agentic workloads, fix bugs, and help with large code migrations.
sentences.zh: Meta向用户推销的是Spark能够处理大型代理工作负载、修复错误以及协助大型代码迁移的能力。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】本句使用了并列结构，列举了Spark的三个主要能力，由and连接最后一个项目。

sentences.en: the kind of automation that enterprises are increasingly turning to AI companies to provide.
sentences.zh: 这种自动化正是企业日益转向AI公司寻求提供的类型。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】本句是定语从句，修饰前面的automation，关系代词that在从句中作provide的宾语。

mc_quiz.question: What is Meta's main selling point for Spark according to the article?
options: A. Its ability to create new programming languages
B. Its capacity to handle large workloads and fix bugs
C. Its low cost compared to competitors
D. Its focus on small business solutions
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：文章第一句明确指出了Meta向用户推销的Spark的主要能力。

translation_task.en: Meta's pitch to users is Spark's ability to handle large agentic workloads, fix bugs, and help with large code migrations.
translation_task.zh: Meta向用户推销的是Spark能够处理大型代理工作负载、修复错误以及协助大型代码迁移的能力。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了英语中pitch作为名词的用法，以及并列结构的翻译技巧。

quiz.question: What is Meta's main selling point for Spark according to the article?
options: A. Its ability to create new programming languages
B. Its capacity to handle large workloads and fix bugs
C. Its low cost compared to competitors
D. Its focus on small business solutions
quiz.hint: 提示：文章第一句明确指出了Meta向用户推销的Spark的主要能力。

title: Call Of Duty: Black Ops 1 And 2 Ports Are Out Now On PS5, But DLC Costs Extra
title_zh: 《使命召唤：黑色行动1》和《黑色行动2》现已登陆PS5，但DLC需额外付费

sentences.en: The ports of Call of Duty: Black Ops (2010) and Black Ops 2 (2012) are available now.
sentences.zh: 《使命召唤：黑色行动》(2010年)和《黑色行动2》(2012年)的移植版现已推出。

sentences.en: The ports, which were confirmed in June, are developed by Iron Galaxy in conjunction with Activision.
sentences.zh: 这些移植版已于六月确认，由Iron Galaxy与动视联合开发。
sentences.grammar: 【定语从句】which引导的非限制性定语从句，修饰ports

sentences.en: As announced previously, these are not remasters or remakes--if you enjoyed the games in their original states, that's what you're getting here.
sentences.zh: 如先前宣布，这些不是重制版或重做版——如果你喜欢游戏的原始状态，那么你在这里得到的正是那个版本。
sentences.grammar: 【条件状语从句】if引导的条件状语从句

sentences.en: The games cost $40, but PlayStation Plus members can get each for $20 through August 6.
sentences.zh: 这些游戏售价40美元，但PlayStation Plus会员可在8月6日前以20美元的价格购买每款游戏。

sentences.en: There is no bundle that puts them together.
sentences.zh: 没有将这两款游戏捆绑在一起的套装。
sentences.grammar: 【定语从句】that引导的定语从句，修饰bundle

sentences.en: Black Ops 1 and 2 are out now on PS4 and PS5.
sentences.zh: 《黑色行动1》和《黑色行动2》现已登陆PS4和PS5平台。

sentences.en: The descriptions for each state that the games offer "a classic Call of Duty experience," and as such, cross-platform multiplayer is not supported.
sentences.zh: 每款游戏的描述都表示它们提供"经典的使命召唤体验"，因此不支持跨平台多人游戏。
sentences.grammar: 【结果状语】as such表示因此，所以

sentences.en: Beyond the base games, Activision is also selling each game's season pass for $30 (or $10 through August 6 for PlayStation Plus members).
sentences.zh: 除了基础游戏外，动视还以30美元的价格出售每款游戏的季票（PlayStation Plus会员可在8月6日前以10美元购买）。

mc_quiz.question: What is the difference between the new Call of Duty: Black Ops ports and remasters?
options: A. The ports have better graphics than remasters
B. The ports are not remasters or remakes, they offer the original game experience
C. The ports only work on PS5 while remasters work on multiple platforms
D. The ports include additional content not found in the original games
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：文章中明确说明了这些移植版不是重制版或重做版，保留了原始游戏状态。

translation_task.en: As announced previously, these are not remasters or remakes--if you enjoyed the games in their original states, that's what you're getting here.
translation_task.zh: 如先前宣布，这些不是重制版或重做版——如果你喜欢游戏的原始状态，那么你在这里得到的正是那个版本。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了破折号的使用和条件状语从句的翻译，以及"in their original states"的准确表达。

quiz.question: What is the difference between the new Call of Duty: Black Ops ports and remasters?
options: A. The ports have better graphics than remasters
B. The ports are not remasters or remakes, they offer the original game experience
C. The ports only work on PS5 while remasters work on multiple platforms
D. The ports include additional content not found in the original games
quiz.hint: 提示：文章中明确说明了这些移植版不是重制版或重做版，保留了原始游戏状态。

title: Arc Raiders' Matchmaking Update Gives Players What They've Always Wanted
title_zh: 《Arc Raiders》匹配系统更新满足玩家长期期待

sentences.en: The latest Arc Raiders update is out now, and alongside the opening of the Expedition 4 window and an upcoming crossover event with Embark's first-person shooter The Finals, the extraction game is getting a matchmaking overhaul that fulfills one of players' biggest wishlist items.
sentences.zh: 最新的《Arc Raiders》更新现已发布，除了开启第4次远征窗口和即将与Embark的第一人称射击游戏《The Finals》联动活动外，这款提取类游戏还进行了一次匹配系统大更新，满足了玩家最期待的愿望之一。
sentences.grammar: 【复合句】包含多个并列成分的复合句，使用了'alongside'和'and'连接多个更新内容

words.meaning: n. 彻底改革，全面检修
n. 愿望清单，期待列表

sentences.en: Starting today, Arc Raiders offers separate matchmaking buckets for solo, duo, and trio queues.
sentences.zh: 从今天开始，《Arc Raiders》为单人、双人和三人队列提供独立的匹配分组。

sentences.en: This means that players who may prefer to express different playstyles depending on their team size can now find lobbies that suit their needs.
sentences.zh: 这意味着那些可能根据队伍大小而偏好不同游戏风格的玩家现在可以找到适合自己需求的游戏房间。
sentences.grammar: 【定语从句】包含两个定语从句，修饰'players'和'lobbies'

words.meaning: n. 游戏风格，玩法风格

sentences.en: Arc Raiders' "aggression-based matchmaking" has been a story surrounding the game since it debuted last October, with players debating how it should work and, initially, whether it truly existed at all.
sentences.zh: 自去年10月发布以来，基于攻击性的匹配系统一直是《Arc Raiders》游戏的热议话题，玩家们争论它应该如何工作，以及最初它是否真的存在。
sentences.grammar: 【现在完成进行时】使用现在完成进行时表示从过去持续到现在的状态

mc_quiz.question: What is the main feature of the latest Arc Raiders update?
options: A. The opening of Expedition 4
B. A crossover event with The Finals
C. Separate matchmaking for different team sizes
D. Improved aggression-based matchmaking
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：文章开头提到更新包含多个内容，但重点在于满足玩家长期期待的匹配系统改进。

translation_task.en: This means that players who may prefer to express different playstyles depending on their team size can now find lobbies that suit their needs.
translation_task.zh: 这意味着那些可能根据队伍大小而偏好不同游戏风格的玩家现在可以找到适合自己需求的游戏房间。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了包含两个定语从句的复合句翻译，以及'playstyle'和'suit their needs'等游戏术语的准确表达。

quiz.question: What is the main feature of the latest Arc Raiders update?
options: A. The opening of Expedition 4
B. A crossover event with The Finals
C. Separate matchmaking for different team sizes
D. Improved aggression-based matchmaking
quiz.hint: 提示：文章开头提到更新包含多个内容，但重点在于满足玩家长期期待的匹配系统改进。

title: If you use Google, you're training its AI. Here's how to opt out.
title_zh: 如果你使用谷歌，你正在训练其人工智能。以下是退出方法。

sentences.en: Consider this a belated PSA: A recent change to Google's privacy settings is allowing the company to store more of your data, including media such as "images, files, and audio and video recordings," to improve its AI models.
sentences.zh: 请将此视为一则迟来的公共服务公告：谷歌最近对其隐私设置进行了一项更改，允许公司存储更多您的数据，包括"图像、文件以及音频和视频录音"等媒体内容，以改进其人工智能模型。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】冒号后的句子结构复杂，包含现在分词短语作目的状语(to improve its AI models)。

mc_quiz.question: What is Google storing to improve its AI models according to the article?
options: A. User search history
B. Personal data including media files
C. Location information
D. Email contacts
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：文章中明确提到了谷歌存储的数据类型，包括"images, files, and audio and video recordings"。

translation_task.en: Consider this a belated PSA: A recent change to Google's privacy settings is allowing the company to store more of your data, including media such as "images, files, and audio and video recordings," to improve its AI models.
translation_task.zh: 请将此视为一则迟来的公共服务公告：谷歌最近对其隐私设置进行了一项更改，允许公司存储更多您的数据，包括"图像、文件以及音频和视频录音"等媒体内容，以改进其人工智能模型。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了复杂句型的翻译，特别是包含引号和列举内容的句子结构，以及专业术语如"PSA"和"AI models"的准确翻译。

quiz.question: What is Google storing to improve its AI models according to the article?
options: A. User search history
B. Personal data including media files
C. Location information
D. Email contacts
quiz.hint: 提示：文章中明确提到了谷歌存储的数据类型，包括"images, files, and audio and video recordings"。

title: Diablo 4's Massive Mythic Item Changes Aren't Finding Many Fans
title_zh: 《暗黑破坏神4》的重大神话装备改动并未获得玩家青睐

sentences.en: Diablo 4 Season 14 dramatically reworked Mythic items in Blizzard's ARPG going forward, and judging from early feedback, it's a change that isn't going over well.
sentences.zh: 《暗黑破坏神4》第14赛季对暴雪的ARPG游戏中的神话装备进行了彻底重做，根据早期反馈来看，这一改动并未获得玩家青睐。
sentences.grammar: 【现在进行时与将来时结合】使用'going forward'表示从现在开始持续到将来的动作，'isn't going over well'表示当前状态。

words.meaning: v. 重新加工；彻底修改

sentences.en: Season of Death Awakening launched on June 30 and introduced what Blizzard coined Mythic Uniques 3.0, a new system where any of the game's hundreds of Unique items could be found (or turned into) even stronger Mythic versions.
sentences.zh: 死亡觉醒赛季于6月30日上线，推出了暴雪称之为'神话装备3.0'的新系统，在这个系统中，游戏中的数百件独特装备都可以被找到（或转化）为更强大的神话版本。
sentences.grammar: 【过去分词作后置定语】'what Blizzard coined'作为'what'引导的名词性从句，'launched'和'introduced'为并列谓语。

sentences.en: In theory, it would open up the game's endgame build options and give players more choices when it comes to outfitting their characters.
sentences.zh: 理论上，这一系统将开放游戏的后期构筑选项，让玩家在装备角色时有更多选择。
sentences.grammar: 【情态动词would表示推测】'would'在此处表示对未来的推测或假设，'when it comes to'是固定表达，意为'当涉及...时'。

sentences.en: Far from just a temporary seasonal change, Blizzard stated it intended for Mythic Uniques 3.0 to be a permanent part of the game going forward.
sentences.zh: 这绝非仅仅是暂时的赛季改动，暴雪表示他们打算让神话装备3.0成为游戏从现在开始永久的一部分。
sentences.grammar: 【'Far from'表示否定】'Far from'后接名词或动名词，表示'远非，绝非'，与后面的意思形成对比。

mc_quiz.question: What is the main issue with the new Mythic Uniques 3.0 system according to the article?
options: A. It was only available for a limited time during Season 14
B. It reduced the number of unique items in the game
C. It added more randomness to Mythics
D. It completely removed all previous unique items
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：文章提到新系统的缺点是增加了神话装备的随机性，请查找相关描述。

translation_task.en: Far from just a temporary seasonal change, Blizzard stated it intended for Mythic Uniques 3.0 to be a permanent part of the game going forward.
translation_task.zh: 这绝非仅仅是暂时的赛季改动，暴雪表示他们打算让神话装备3.0成为游戏从现在开始永久的一部分。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了'Far from'表示否定的用法以及'intend for'表示'打算让...'的句型结构。

quiz.question: What is the main issue with the new Mythic Uniques 3.0 system according to the article?
options: A. It was only available for a limited time during Season 14
B. It reduced the number of unique items in the game
C. It added more randomness to Mythics
D. It completely removed all previous unique items
quiz.hint: 提示：文章提到新系统的缺点是增加了神话装备的随机性，请查找相关描述。

title: OpenAI proposed donating 5% of its equity to a US sovereign wealth fund
title_zh: OpenAI提议向美国主权财富基金捐赠5%股权

sentences.en: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman has reportedly proposed giving 5% of the company's equity to a U.S. sovereign wealth fund, reviving discussions about letting the public share in the financial gains from the AI boom.
sentences.zh: 据报道，OpenAI首席执行官萨姆·奥特曼提议将公司5%的股权捐赠给美国主权财富基金，这重新引发了关于让公众分享人工智能热潮带来的经济收益的讨论。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】现在完成时态与现在分词作状语结构

words.meaning: adj. 主权的；至高无上的
v. 使复苏；重新唤起（revive的现在分词）

mc_quiz.question: What percentage of equity did OpenAI CEO Sam Altman propose to donate to a U.S. sovereign wealth fund?
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：文章第一句明确提到了具体的百分比数字。

translation_task.en: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman has reportedly proposed giving 5% of the company's equity to a U.S. sovereign wealth fund, reviving discussions about letting the public share in the financial gains from the AI boom.
translation_task.zh: 据报道，OpenAI首席执行官萨姆·奥特曼提议将公司5%的股权捐赠给美国主权财富基金，这重新引发了关于让公众分享人工智能热潮带来的经济收益的讨论。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了长句中现在分词作结果状语的结构，以及专业术语'equity'和'sovereign wealth fund'的准确翻译。

quiz.question: What percentage of equity did OpenAI CEO Sam Altman propose to donate to a U.S. sovereign wealth fund?
quiz.hint: 提示：文章第一句明确提到了具体的百分比数字。

title: $2.50 Steam Sale Has Everyone Smashing The Surveillance State
title_zh: 2.5美元Steam促销活动让众人纷纷对抗监控国家

sentences.en: One of Ubisoft's most underrated games, Watch Dogs 2, is on a super steep sale on Steam right now.
sentences.zh: 育碧公司最被低估的游戏之一《看门狗2》目前正在Steam上进行超级大幅度的促销。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】同位语结构介绍游戏名称

sentences.en: So steep, in fact, that it seems to have inspired a new crop of folks to trawl through the technocratic world of digitized San Francisco to put an end to the surveillance state at a time when we're all under some sort of surveillance IRL.
sentences.zh: 事实上，折扣幅度如此之大，以至于似乎激励了一批新人去探索数字化旧金山的技术官僚世界，终结监控国家，而此时我们在现实生活中都处于某种监控之下。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】结果状语从句，at a time when引导的时间状语从句

words.meaning: abbr. In Real Life (现实生活中)

sentences.en: Over on the game's Steam store page, you can pick Watch Dogs 2 for just $2.50 until Thursday, July 9.
sentences.zh: 在该游戏的Steam商店页面，你可以以仅2.50美元的价格购买《看门狗2》，促销将持续到7月9日星期四。

sentences.en: That's a 95% discount for a game that normally retails for $50.
sentences.zh: 这款游戏原价50美元，现在相当于打了95折。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】定语从句修饰游戏

sentences.en: And that's just the base game! If you wanted to grab the DLC--which includes new cars, co-op adventures, outfits, weapons, world missions, and more--then you can snatch up either the Deluxe Edition for $3 or the Gold Edition for $4.
sentences.zh: 这还只是基础游戏！如果你想下载DLC（包括新汽车、合作冒险、服装、武器、世界任务等），那么你可以花3美元购买豪华版或4美元购买黄金版。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】破折号插入语解释DLC内容

mc_quiz.question: What is the special offer for Watch Dogs 2 on Steam?
options: A. 50% discount on the base game
B. 95% discount on the base game
C. Free DLC with the base game
D. Buy one get one free offer
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：文章中明确提到了折扣百分比，请查找相关信息。

translation_task.en: So steep, in fact, that it seems to have inspired a new crop of folks to trawl through the technocratic world of digitized San Francisco to put an end to the surveillance state at a time when we're all under some sort of surveillance IRL.
translation_task.zh: 事实上，折扣幅度如此之大，以至于似乎激励了一批新人去探索数字化旧金山的技术官僚世界，终结监控国家，而此时我们在现实生活中都处于某种监控之下。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了结果状语从句、同位语结构以及破折号插入语的翻译技巧。

quiz.question: What is the special offer for Watch Dogs 2 on Steam?
options: A. 50% discount on the base game
B. 95% discount on the base game
C. Free DLC with the base game
D. Buy one get one free offer
quiz.hint: 提示：文章中明确提到了折扣百分比，请查找相关信息。

title: Ashton Kutcher leaving Sound Ventures to launch new VC firm with Morgan Beller
title_zh: 艾什顿·库彻离开声创投，与摩根·贝勒共同创立新风投公司

sentences.en: Sound built its reputation on concentrated, high-conviction bets in category-leading AI labs.
sentences.zh: 声创投通过在行业领先的AI实验室进行集中、高信念的投资建立了其声誉。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】过去完成时态表示过去某时已经完成的动作，介词短语'on...'表示方式或基础。

sentences.en: while Kutcher's new fund appears to be chasing the layer underneath those companies — the infrastructure and energy that power them.
sentences.zh: 而库彻的新基金似乎正在追逐那些公司之下的层面——为它们提供动力和支持的基础设施和能源。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】while引导的对比状语从句，破折号后的内容是对'layer'的具体解释。

mc_quiz.question: What is the main difference between Sound Ventures and Kutcher's new fund according to the article?
options: A. Sound Ventures focuses on AI labs while Kutcher's fund focuses on infrastructure
B. Sound Ventures has a larger investment portfolio
C. Kutcher's fund only invests in energy companies
D. Sound Ventures is newer than Kutcher's fund
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：文章明确指出了两家投资公司在投资重点上的差异，请关注'while'引导的对比句。

translation_task.en: while Kutcher's new fund appears to be chasing the layer underneath those companies — the infrastructure and energy that power them.
translation_task.zh: 而库彻的新基金似乎正在追逐那些公司之下的层面——为它们提供动力和支持的基础设施和能源。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了破折号作为解释性插入语的翻译技巧，以及'chasing'在商业语境中的引申义翻译。

options: A. Sound Ventures focuses on AI labs while Kutcher's fund focuses on infrastructure
B. Sound Ventures has a larger investment portfolio

title: Profoundly Disappointed: Companies Respond To Sony's Decision To End Disc Support
title_zh: 深感失望：各公司回应索尼停止光盘支持的决定

sentences.en: A number of companies have responded to the news that Sony will no longer support physical PlayStation discs beginning in 2028.
sentences.zh: 多家公司已对索尼将于2028年起不再支持PlayStation实体光盘的消息作出回应。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】现在完成时与将来时的结合使用，表示对将来事件的反应。

sentences.en: That includes iam8bit, a company known for its physical gaming collectibles, which said it is "profoundly disappointed" by the news.
sentences.zh: 其中包括iam8bit公司，该公司以实体游戏收藏品闻名，并表示对这一消息"深感失望"。

sentences.en: "Physical games are vital to games preservation, ownership, and consumer choice, values that have guided iam8bit since our first physical release in 2016," the company said.
sentences.zh: 该公司表示："实体游戏对游戏保存、所有权和消费者选择至关重要，这些价值观自2016年我们首次发布实体产品以来一直指导着iam8bit的发展。"
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】包含插入语和定语从句的复杂句结构。

words.meaning: adj. 至关重要的，必不可少的

sentences.en: The company added that it remains committed to these values.
sentences.zh: 该公司补充说，它仍然致力于这些价值观。

sentences.en: "Long live physical media," iam8bit said in its sign-off.
sentences.zh: iam8bit在结束语中表示："实体媒体万岁。"

mc_quiz.question: What is iam8bit's main concern about Sony's decision to end disc support?
options: A. It will increase the cost of games
B. It threatens game preservation, ownership, and consumer choice
C. It will reduce collaboration with other companies
D. It will affect the release of vinyl soundtracks
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：查看iam8bit公司声明中提到的核心价值观。

translation_task.en: "Physical games are vital to games preservation, ownership, and consumer choice, values that have guided iam8bit since our first physical release in 2016," the company said.
translation_task.zh: 该公司表示："实体游戏对游戏保存、所有权和消费者选择至关重要，这些价值观自2016年我们首次发布实体产品以来一直指导着iam8bit的发展。"
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了包含插入语和定语从句的复杂句翻译，以及专业术语的准确表达。

quiz.question: What is iam8bit's main concern about Sony's decision to end disc support?

B. It threatens game preservation, ownership, and consumer choice

quiz.hint: 提示：查看iam8bit公司声明中提到的核心价值观。

title: Love And Deepspace Cancels Its New Love Interest After Fan Backlash
title_zh: 《爱与深空》因粉丝反对取消新角色恋情线

sentences.en: Shortly after developer Papergames announced the addition of Valko--a new love interest in the mobile action dating sim Love and Deepspace --the backlash from fans has spilled into the real world.
sentences.zh: 在开发商Papergames宣布在手机动作恋爱模拟游戏《爱与深空》中新增角色Valko后不久，来自粉丝的反对声浪已经蔓延到现实世界。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】破折号的使用，插入语结构

words.meaning: n. 强烈反对，强烈反应

sentences.en: Now, Papergames is reversing course by canceling Valko's debut and pledging to focus on the five other love interests who are already in the game.
sentences.zh: 现在，Papergames已经改变决定，取消了Valko的登场，并承诺专注于游戏中已有的五位恋爱角色。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】现在进行时表示当前正在发生的变化，by doing sth.方式状语

words.meaning: phr. 改变决定，改变方向

sentences.en: "We recognize that we moved forward with the introduction of Valko before we were truly ready," reads the statement posted to Love and Deepspace's Instagram account.
sentences.zh: 发布在《爱与深空》Instagram账号上的声明写道："我们意识到在真正准备好之前就推出了Valko角色。"
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】引述句结构，主谓倒装（reads the statement）

sentences.en: "In doing so, we let down the players who have supported us from the start, and we also fell short of delivering the experience that players anticipating Valko deserved."
sentences.zh: "这样做我们辜负了从一开始就支持我们的玩家，也未能达到期待Valko的玩家应得的游戏体验。"
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】现在完成时表示持续到现在的动作，fall short of doing sth.结构

mc_quiz.question: Why did Papergames decide to cancel Valko's debut?
options: A. Because they didn't have enough resources to develop the character.
B. Because fans strongly opposed the addition of a new love interest.
C. Because they realized they weren't ready to introduce Valko properly.
D. Because they wanted to focus on other game features instead.
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：查看声明中提到的关于准备工作的内容。

translation_task.en: "In doing so, we let down the players who have supported us from the start, and we also fell short of delivering the experience that players anticipating Valko deserved."
translation_task.zh: "这样做我们辜负了从一开始就支持我们的玩家，也未能达到期待Valko的玩家应得的游戏体验。"
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了英语中fall short of doing sth.的表达方式，以及现在分词短语作后置定语的翻译技巧。

title: Xbox Devs Call For Worker Protections Ahead Of Likely Layoffs
title_zh: Xbox开发者呼吁在可能裁员前加强员工保护

sentences.en: Earlier this month, rumors began to spread about potentially massive layoffs coming to Microsoft's Xbox gaming division this summer.
sentences.zh: 本月早些时候，有关微软Xbox游戏部门今年夏天可能进行大规模裁员的谣言开始传播。
sentences.grammar: 【时态与情态】使用一般过去时描述已发生事件，'potentially'表示可能性

sentences.en: While the majority of those cuts don't appear to have happened yet, game developers under Xbox have come together to push for more layoff protections for their members.
sentences.zh: 尽管大部分裁员似乎尚未发生，但Xbox旗下的游戏开发者已经团结起来，为其成员争取更多的裁员保护。
sentences.grammar: 【让步状语从句】'While'引导的让步状语从句，表示尽管...

sentences.en: Members of the United Video Game Workers and representatives from workers at Microsoft's first-party studios--including Bethesda's parent company Zenimax, as well as Activision Blizzard--were present at a press conference conducted by the Communications Workers of America.
sentences.zh: 美国视频游戏工会成员以及微软第一方工作室的工人代表——包括贝塞斯达的母公司ZeniMax，以及动视暴雪——都参加了由美国通信工会举办的新闻发布会。
sentences.grammar: 【插入语】破折号之间的内容为插入语，提供补充信息

words.meaning: n. 工作室（studio的复数形式）

sentences.en: Collectively, they pushed for enhanced layoff protections for all Xbox workers, including advance warning of impending layoffs, temporary hiring freezes to give the remaining devs a chance to advance internally, and tw...
sentences.zh: 他们集体呼吁为所有Xbox员工加强裁员保护，包括提前预警即将到来的裁员、临时冻结招聘以让剩余的开发人员有机会内部晋升，以及...
sentences.grammar: 【并列结构】'including'引导的并列结构，列举具体措施

words.meaning: adj. 即将发生的，迫近的

mc_quiz.question: What specific protections are Xbox developers pushing for according to the article?
options: A. Higher salaries and better working conditions
B. Advance warning of layoffs, temporary hiring freezes, and internal advancement opportunities
C. Stock options and profit-sharing plans
D. Union recognition and collective bargaining rights
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：文章第二段明确提到了开发者们呼吁的具体保护措施。

translation_task.en: Members of the United Video Game Workers and representatives from workers at Microsoft's first-party studios--including Bethesda's parent company Zenimax, as well as Activision Blizzard--were present at a press conference conducted by the Communications Workers of America.
translation_task.zh: 美国视频游戏工会成员以及微软第一方工作室的工人代表——包括贝塞斯达的母公司ZeniMax，以及动视暴雪——都参加了由美国通信工会举办的新闻发布会。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了长句中插入语的处理技巧，以及专业名词的准确翻译。

quiz.hint: 提示：文章第二段明确提到了开发者们呼吁的具体保护措施。

title: Steam Machine Preorders Are About To Begin, So Of Course They're Already On eBay
title_zh: Steam Machine预售即将开始，当然它们已经出现在eBay上

sentences.en: The Steam Machine isn't even out yet, though Valve has begun sending out confusing emails about whether people are in the "queue" or on the "waitlist" for the device.
sentences.zh: 尽管Steam Machine尚未发布，但Valve已经开始发送令人困惑的电子邮件，询问人们是否在设备的"队列"中或处于"等待名单"上。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】though引导的让步状语从句，主句使用现在完成进行时

sentences.en: That hasn't stopped netizens from doing the inevitable, though: listing their reservations on eBay to make a quick buck.
sentences.zh: 然而，这并没有阻止网民们做不可避免的事情：在eBay上列出他们的预订，以快速赚钱。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】though置于句首表示转折，冒号后面解释前面的内容

words.meaning: adj. 不可避免的，必然发生的

sentences.en: If you head over to eBay—or GameBay (?), since GameStop really wants to buy the online marketplace —and search for the Steam Machine, you'll see a handful of postings for Valve's upcoming living room PC.
sentences.zh: 如果你前往eBay——或者GameBay（？），因为GameStop真的想收购这个在线市场——并搜索Steam Machine，你会看到一些关于Valve即将推出的客厅电脑的帖子。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】if引导的条件状语从句，破折号之间的插入语补充说明

sentences.en: The system is already expensive, running between $1050 and $1430 depending on the model, but these listings go for about double the regular price.
sentences.zh: 该系统已经很昂贵，根据型号不同价格在1050美元到1430美元之间，但这些挂牌价格大约是正常价格的两倍。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】现在分词短语作伴随状语，but表示转折

sentences.en: The Steam Machine listings GameSpot has viewed so far are all for "confirmed reservations."
sentences.zh: GameSpot迄今为止查看的Steam Machine挂牌都是针对"已确认的预订"。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】定语从句修饰listings，引号表示特定术语

words.meaning: adj. 已确认的，已证实的

sentences.en: This means that the eBay seller received one of those perplexing emails...
sentences.zh: 这意味着eBay卖家收到了那些令人困惑的电子邮件之一...
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】that引导的宾语从句，省略了表示继续的省略号

words.meaning: adj. 令人困惑的，复杂的

mc_quiz.question: What are the eBay listings for Steam Machines primarily based on?
options: A. The actual devices that are already available
B. Confirmed reservations for the upcoming device
C. Marketing materials from Valve
D. Previous models of Steam Machines
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：文章中明确提到eBay上的挂牌是什么类型的。

sentences.en: As ASML CEO Christophe Fouquet told TechCrunch in May, what China can currently buy are older-generation deep ultraviolet tools — gear first shipped about a decade ago — the same machines the MATCH Act would now put off-limits.
sentences.zh: 正如ASML首席执行官克里斯托夫·福凯在5月告诉TechCrunch的那样，中国目前能够购买的是老一代深紫外光工具——这些设备大约在十年前首次发货——而这些正是《MATCH法案》现在将禁止的机器。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】本句使用了复杂的主语从句和插入语结构，包含破折号补充说明。

title: Xbox Series S, The "Cheap" Option, Now Costs As Much As Series X Did Six Years Ago
title_zh: Xbox Series S，这款"廉价"选项，现在的价格与六年前Series X首发时相同

sentences.en: When Xbox Series S launched alongside Series X and PS5, it presented a compelling argument: Play all of the same games as elsewhere, albeit with lesser performance and visuals, for way cheaper.
sentences.zh: 当Xbox Series S与Series X和PS5同时发布时，它提出了一个令人信服的论点：以便宜得多的价格玩到所有与其他平台相同的游戏，尽管性能和视觉效果较差。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】although引导的让步状语从句，破折号后的补充说明结构

words.meaning: adj. 令人信服的，引人入胜的

sentences.en: $300 felt surprisingly reasonable, giving you a way to save $100 compared to the cheapest PS5 and $200 compared to the more premium PS5 and Series X models.
sentences.zh: 300美元的价格感觉出奇地合理，让你比最便宜的PS5节省100美元，比更高端的PS5和Series X型号节省200美元。

sentences.en: With the Series S turning six later this year, you'd expect it--like every other console--to get cheaper over time, as has always been the case.
sentences.zh: 随着Series S在今年晚些时候迎来六周年，你会期望它像其他所有游戏机一样随时间推移而降价，这向来是行业惯例。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】破折号插入语，as引导的定语从句

sentences.en: But this is 2026, baby. Welcome to hell.
sentences.zh: 但这是2026年，宝贝。欢迎来到地狱。

sentences.en: Beginning August 1, Xbox Series S will cost as much as Xbox Series X did at launch in November 2020 : $500.
sentences.zh: 从8月1日开始，Xbox Series S的价格将与2020年11月首发时的Xbox Series X相同：500美元。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】as...as比较结构，did替代cost避免重复

options: A. Xbox Series S is cheaper than other gaming consoles

mc_quiz.hint: 提示：文章重点讨论了Xbox Series S价格的变化情况，特别是与首发价格的对比。

title: Sonic's New Chaos Hunt Game Includes Some Fine Print You Shouldn't Skip
title_zh: 索尼克新游戏《混沌狩猎》包含不应忽视的细则

sentences.en: The 35th anniversary of Sonic the Hedgehog is arriving later this year, and one of the ways that Sega is celebrating the event is a new ARG game called Chaos Hunt.
sentences.zh: 刺猬索尼克35周年庆典将于今年晚些时候举行，世嘉庆祝这一活动的方式之一是一款名为《混沌狩猎》的新ARG游戏。
sentences.grammar: 【复合句】包含两个并列分句，由and连接，描述了两个相关事实。

sentences.en: Fans have been invited to hunt for some missing Chaos Emeralds, but players should probably check out the fine print before they take part in it.
sentences.zh: 粉丝们被邀请去寻找一些失踪的混沌翡翠，但玩家在参与前最好先查看细则。
sentences.grammar: 【复合句】包含由but连接的两个转折关系的分句，使用了现在完成时被动语态。

words.meaning: n. 细则，小字印刷的条款

sentences.en: As noted by user Luna Leo on social media, the terms of service for Chaos Hunt requires players to agree to AI model training and to sharing their details with third-party AI vendors.
sentences.zh: 正如社交媒体用户Luna Leo所指出的，《混沌狩猎》的服务条款要求玩家同意AI模型训练，并与第三方AI供应商共享他们的详细信息。
sentences.grammar: 【复杂句】包含由as引导的状语从句，主语是the terms of service，谓语是requires，后面接两个并列的宾语。

sentences.en: The terms note that "We use reasonable efforts to prohibit [third-party] providers from using any of your personal information for the purposes of developing and improving their AI models."
sentences.zh: 条款中写道："我们会尽合理努力禁止[第三方]供应商使用您的任何个人信息来开发和改进他们的AI模型。"
sentences.grammar: 【间接引语】包含一个直接引语，使用了引号，引语中包含目的状语for the purposes of...

mc_quiz.question: What do players need to agree to according to the terms of service for Chaos Hunt?
options: A. Sharing their gaming achievements with other players
B. Participating in AI model training and sharing details with third-party AI vendors
C. Paying additional fees for special in-game items
D. Creating their own content based on Sonic characters
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：请仔细阅读第二段第一句，其中明确提到了服务条款的要求。

title: SpaceX inks compute deal with Reflection AI, an open source AI lab
title_zh: SpaceX与开源AI实验室Reflection AI签署计算协议

sentences.en: Reflection AI will pay $150 million a month beginning July 1, 2026 through 2029 for immediate access to Nvidia's latest GB300 AI chips and supporting hardware across SpaceX's Colossus 2 data center near Memphis, Tennessee.
sentences.zh: Reflection AI将从2026年7月1日起至2029年，每月支付1.5亿美元，以立即获得位于田纳西州孟菲斯附近的SpaceX Colossus 2数据中心内Nvidia最新的GB300 AI芯片及相关硬件的使用权限。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】本句包含时间状语(beginning July 1, 2026 through 2029)和目的状语(for immediate access...)，结构复杂但清晰。

mc_quiz.question: What is the monthly payment amount from Reflection AI to SpaceX for the compute deal?
options: A. $150 million
B. $150 billion
C. $15 million
D. $1.5 billion
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：文章中明确提到了每月支付的金额，请仔细查找数字部分。

translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了长句中时间状语(beginning...through...)和目的状语(for...)的翻译处理，以及专业术语(compute deal, AI chips, data center)的准确翻译。
